_apw.policy: contains reviewed APW event summaries and APW metadata only; no raw provider content.

description: Reviewed AI-provider change events for developer cost, quotas, model availability, defaults, deprecations, incidents, and migration risk.

limitations: APW records availability and regional facts only; exact account eligibility, quota, pricing, latency, and feature parity require AWS account-level verification.
The official announcement was reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose is copied into APW.

items.content_text:
AWS announced OpenAI GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.5 availability on Amazon Bedrock in US East (N. Virginia), expanding regional Bedrock access for OpenAI model workloads through the Responses API.

Kind: model_launch
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:aws-bedrock
items.summary: AWS announced OpenAI GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.5 availability on Amazon Bedrock in US East (N. Virginia), expanding regional Bedrock access for OpenAI model workloads through the Responses API.
items.title: AWS Bedrock Added OpenAI GPT-5.4 And GPT-5.5 In US East N. Virginia

limitations: This event is a planning signal from the reviewed lifecycle table, not a claim that every listed model has the same exact shutdown date.
Google may update final retirement dates; consumers should monitor the official lifecycle page before making irreversible migrations.

items.content_text:
Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform model-version page lists future lifecycle dates for Gemini 2.5, Gemini Live native audio, Gemini image, and embedding model IDs, giving developers migration-planning windows for Vertex and agent-platform workloads.

Kind: model_deprecation
Severity: medium
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:google
items.summary: Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform model-version page lists future lifecycle dates for Gemini 2.5, Gemini Live native audio, Gemini image, and embedding model IDs, giving developers migration-planning windows for Vertex and agent-platform workloads.
items.title: Google Cloud Listed Gemini And Embedding Model Lifecycle Dates

limitations: APW records a mobile-app workflow change, not a canonical API pricing, quota, or token-accounting change.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.

items.content_text:
OpenAI's Codex changelog for ChatGPT iOS 1.2026.153 records Codex Mobile support for branch/worktree setup, environment setup scripts, goal management, inline review comments, side chat from transcript selection, prompt editing, and usage/token activity views.

Kind: workflow_behavior_change
Severity: medium
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:openai
items.summary: OpenAI's Codex changelog for ChatGPT iOS 1.2026.153 records Codex Mobile support for branch/worktree setup, environment setup scripts, goal management, inline review comments, side chat from transcript selection, prompt editing, and usage/token activity views.
items.title: OpenAI Added Codex Mobile Worktree, Goal, And Review Controls

limitations: The plugin catalog cache mentioned in the changelog is software-cache behavior; APW does not classify it as prompt caching or token accounting.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.

items.content_text:
Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for May 2026 point to GPT Realtime 2.0 preview, GPT Realtime Translate, and GPT Realtime Whisper concept coverage for low-latency audio translation and transcription workflows.

Kind: model_launch
Severity: low
Confidence: high
Providers: provider:azure-openai

limitations: Limited-preview access, AWS account eligibility, regional availability, and exact Bedrock pricing require account-level verification.

items.content_text:
OpenAI announced limited-preview AWS availability for OpenAI models on Amazon Bedrock, Codex configured to use Bedrock as a provider, and Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI.

Kind: model_launch
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:openai, provider:aws-bedrock
items.summary: OpenAI announced limited-preview AWS availability for OpenAI models on Amazon Bedrock, Codex configured to use Bedrock as a provider, and Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI.
items.title: OpenAI Added Models, Codex, And Managed Agents On AWS

limitations: The announcement says GPT-5.5 is more token efficient than GPT-5.4, but APW records listed unit prices and does not estimate workload-level savings.
No raw announcement body is copied into APW.

items.content_text:
OpenAI announced GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro availability for ChatGPT and Codex paid/business plans, later updated the announcement to mark API availability, and listed API token pricing plus Batch, Flex, and Priority processing multipliers.

Kind: model_launch
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:openai
items.summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro availability for ChatGPT and Codex paid/business plans, later updated the announcement to mark API availability, and listed API token pricing plus Batch, Flex, and Priority processing multipliers.
items.title: OpenAI Launched GPT-5.5 For ChatGPT, Codex, And API Developers

limitations: This event summarizes a deprecations-table section and does not reproduce the full table.
Some affected model IDs have later October 23, 2026 shutdown dates; consumers should check the official table for model-specific deadlines.

items.content_text:
OpenAI's deprecations table schedules shutdowns for older GPT, Codex, search, audio, realtime, and reasoning model snapshots beginning July 23, 2026, with additional legacy GPT snapshot removals on October 23, 2026.

Kind: model_retirement
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:openai
items.summary: OpenAI's deprecations table schedules shutdowns for older GPT, Codex, search, audio, realtime, and reasoning model snapshots beginning July 23, 2026, with additional legacy GPT snapshot removals on October 23, 2026.
items.title: OpenAI Scheduled Legacy GPT And Codex Snapshot Retirements For July And October 2026

title: AI Provider Watch Reviewed Events
